articles.title_en: Vietnam Inaugurates Major Wastewater Treatment Plant in Da Nang, Bolstering Urban Resilience
articles.summary_en: MONRE announces the full operation of a state-of-the-art wastewater facility in Da Nang, significantly improving urban water quality.

articles.title_en: MONRE Unveils 2026-2030 National Strategy for Sustainable Water Management
articles.summary_en: MONRE launches its next phase strategy, focusing on expanding treatment capacity, attracting FDI, and green technologies by 2030.

articles.title_en: World Bank Commits Further Funding to Vietnam's MONRE for Mekong Delta Wastewater Projects
articles.summary_en: The World Bank pledges new funding to support MONRE-led wastewater projects in the Mekong Delta, accelerating environmental goals.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Faces Hurdles in Early 2026 Enforcement of New Waste Classification
articles.summary_en: Despite 2025 rollout, Vietnam faces hurdles enforcing household waste separation, needing public awareness and infrastructure.

articles.title_en: Pilot Programs Show Promise Amidst National Waste Enforcement Challenges
articles.summary_en: Key cities demonstrate progress in enforcing waste separation, though national compliance remains uneven post-2025 regulations.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Seeks Private Investment for Waste-to-Energy as 2026 Enforcement Matures
articles.summary_en: Stronger waste regulation enforcement by 2026 drives Vietnam's push for private investment in modern waste processing.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $500M for Ho Chi Minh City Green Metro Line Extension
articles.summary_en: ADB funding boosts HCMC's sustainable urban transport, reducing emissions and enhancing connectivity.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures $300M ADB Loan for National Smart Grid Development
articles.summary_en: ADB loan to modernize Vietnam's power grid, integrating more renewables and improving energy efficiency.

articles.title_en: ADB Backs Mekong Delta Climate Resilience with New $250M Infrastructure Loan
articles.summary_en: Funding supports critical infrastructure to mitigate climate impacts and enhance water management in the Mekong Delta.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Mekong Delta Sees Major Clean Water Project Completion by ADB
articles.summary_en: A multi-year ADB initiative in the Mekong Delta wraps up, providing potable water to over 1.5 million residents.

articles.summary_en: ADB commits $350M for advanced wastewater treatment plants in Hanoi and HCMC, tackling urban pollution.

articles.summary_en: Mid-term reports show significant progress in water infrastructure and environmental protection initiatives.

articles.summary_en: Discussions explore expanding successful climate-resilient water supply projects to new Vietnamese regions.

articles.title_en: JICA Funds Smart Grid Modernization and Renewable Energy Integration in Vietnam
articles.summary_en: Vietnam receives a JICA ODA loan to upgrade its power grid and integrate more renewable energy sources by 2030.

articles.summary_en: Vietnam's industrial parks anticipate a surge in FDI for 2026, fueled by strategic infrastructure upgrades, including new expressways and port expansions. High-tech manufacturing and renewable energy sectors are key targets, with ready-built factory availability enhancing investor appeal.

articles.summary_en: The Vietnamese government's push for green and smart industrial parks is attracting significant foreign direct investment in 2026. articles.title_en: Vietnam's First Gigawatt-Scale Offshore Wind Farm Underway, Boosting PDP8 Goals
articles.summary_en: Landmark multi-billion dollar offshore wind project breaks ground, boosting Vietnam's 2026 PDP8 renewable goals.

articles.summary_en: Innovative grid upgrades and policy shifts empower Vietnam's burgeoning solar energy capacity across 2026.

articles.summary_en: Ho Chi Minh City's Metro Line 1 is fully operational in 2026, spurring renewed studies for a direct metro connection to the new Long Thanh International Airport.
